metadata.title: Synaply - Ithute tlotlotšhoko ka AI le Poeletšo e Katologantšwego
metadata.description: Tokafatša bokgoni bja gago bja polelo ka poeletšo e katologantšwego e hlohleleditšwego ke AI. Hlama malokelelo a mantšu a gago goba o ithute go tšwa go malokelelo a phatlalatša ao a abelanwago ke setšhaba.
metadata.keywords: ithute seisemane, poeletšo e katologantšwego, seagi sa tlotlotšhoko, dikarata tša go ithuta, go ithuta polelo ka AI, malokelelo a mantšu, lenaneo la thuto ya polelo, ithute sespania, ithute sefora, ithute sejeremane, bokgoni bja polelo, gopola mantšu, go ithuta ka SRS
metadata.og_title: Synaply - Thuto ya Tlotlotšhoko e bohlale
metadata.og_description: Tokafatša bokgoni bja gago bja polelo ka poeletšo e katologantšwego e hlohleleditšwego ke AI. Ithute ka lebelo, o gopole nako e teletšana.
metadata.og_image_alt: Sešupatsela sa Lenaneo la Thuto ya Polelo la Synaply AI
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Ithute Mantšu a Mafsa ntle le boiteko
metadata.twitter_description: Ikopolanye le Synaply go katološa tlotlotšhoko ya gago o diriša poeletšo e katologantšwego e bohlale le AI.

common.title: Thaetlele
common.no_data: Ga go na tshedimošo ye e hwetšagalago
common.offline_mode: Mokgwa wa go se be Inthaneteng

dashboard.title: Letlapa la ditiro
dashboard.subtitle: Go ithuta {target} go tšwa go {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Fetleka malokelelo a mantšu a phatlalatša le dilenaneo tša thuto go tšwa go badiriši ba bangwe.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Tokafatša tlotlotšhoko ya gago ka go fetolela mafoko a a hlamilwego ke AI go ya ka sehlogo sefe kapa sefe goba lelokelelo la mantšu la gago.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Leba, nyaka, mpshafatša goba o phumole mantšu go tšwa go kgoboketšo ya gago.
dashboard.import_error_retry: Re paletšwe ke go boloka lentšu la gago le lefsa. A re lekeng gape semolao!
dashboard.generate_word_list_error: Go paletšwe go hlama lelokelelo la mantšu.
dashboard.select_topic_error: Ka kopo kgetha sehlogo goba o tsenye mooko wa gago.
dashboard.translation_placeholder: Phetolelo (goba o diriše phetolelo ya itiragalelago)
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI e tlo thuša ka tlhalošo le lefoko la mohlala
dashboard.auto_translate: Fetolela lefelo le le se nago selo ka itiragalelago
dashboard.delete_confirm: Na o tišegile gore o nyaka go phumola lentšu le?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Na o tišegile gore o nyaka go phumola mantšu a gago KA MOKA? Se se ka se kgone go fegollwa.
dashboard.no_words_found: Ga go mantšu a hweditšwego. Leka lereo le lengwe la go nyaka goba o oketše mantšu a mangwe!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Ga go mantšu a hweditšwego go ithuta. Ka kopo oketša mantšu a mafsa lelokelelong la gago pele!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Ga o na mantšu ao o swanetšego go a boeletša lehono. Boela morago nako e nngwe goba o oketše mantšu a mafsa!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Mošomo o mobotse! O boeleditše mantšu a gago a lehono.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Tsenya sehlogo go hlama mafoko a thutong ao a hlametšwego wena feela!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Go e tlogela e le feela go tlo hlama mafoko go ya ka tlotlotšhoko ya gago.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Re thuše go kaofatša! Abela dikgopolo tša gago, bega diphošo, goba o kope dintlha tša mafsa:
dashboard.support_desc: Ge o rata lenaneo le, o ka thekga tšwelopele ya lona.

onboarding.journey_begins: Leeto la gago la go ba setswiri sa polelo le thoma mo.
onboarding.best_practice: Tsela ye e Botse kudu ya Katlego
onboarding.strategy_desc: Go hwetša tše dintši go tšwa go Synaply, re go eletša go diriša leano le le bonolo le:
onboarding.step1_desc: Oketša mantšu a ka bago a 100 ao a amanago le sehlogo se tee (mohlala, Kgwebo goba Maeto) go aga mooko o matla.
onboarding.step2_desc: E ba setswiri sa mantšu a ka poeletšo ya tšatši le tšatši go fihlela e ba karolo ya tlotlotšhoko ya gago.
onboarding.step3_desc: Fetogela go Tšhidullo ya AI go diriša tlotlotšhoko ya gago ye mpsha mafokong a feletšego le maemong a nnete a lefase.
onboarding.got_it: Ke a kwešiša, a re thomeng!

dashboard.list_title_placeholder: mohlala: Tlotlotšhoko e bohlokwa ya IT
dashboard.publish_success: Lelokelelo la mantšu le phatlaladitšwe ka katlego!
dashboard.publish_error: Go paletšwe go phatlalatša lelokelelo la mantšu.
dashboard.duplicate_word_error: Lentšu "{word}" le šetše le le gona lelokelelong
dashboard.inline_add_error: Ka kopo fana ka lentšu la mathomo le phetolelo
dashboard.save_batch_success: O bolokile mantšu a {count} ka katlego lelokelelong la gago!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Go paletšwe go boloka mantšu. Ka kopo leka gape.
dashboard.no_words_to_save: Ga go mantšu a go bolokwa
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Ka kopo phumola mantšu ao a ipoeletšago pele o boloka.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Ka kopo phumola mantšu ao a ipoeletšago pele o phatlalatša.

topics.home: Gae & Bophelo bja Tšatši le tšatši

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: AI e tšere nako e kopana ya go nwa kofi. Ka kopo leka gape ka morago ga mzanyana!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Sowee! Re paletšwe ke go hwetša temogo ya AI. A re lekeng gape!

public_lists.subtitle: Fetleka malokelelo a mantšu a hlamilwego ke badiriši ba bangwe bakeng sa dipolelo tša gago.
public_lists.search_placeholder: Nyaka malokelelo ka thaetlele goba tlhalošo...
public_lists.loading: E laišago malokelelo a a makatšago...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Leka nyako ye nngwe goba o fetole dintlha tša gago tša dipolelo.
public_lists.show_all_langs: Bontšha malokelelo a dipolelo ka moka
public_lists.load_error: Re paletšwe ke go laiša malokelelo a phatlalatša ka nako ye.
public_lists.no_description: Ga go tlhalošo ye e filwego.
public_lists.playlists_no_found: Ga go dilenaneo tša thuto tše di hweditšwego
public_lists.playlists_no_lists: Ga go na malokelelo a phatlalatša

playlists_detail.not_found: Lenaneo la thuto ga la hwetšwa

detail.added_error: Go paletšwe ke go oketša mantšu kgoboketšong ya gago.

detail.duplicate_error: There are duplicate words in the list. Please remove them before saving.

profile.terms_welcome: O amogetšwe go Synaply. Ka go diriša ditirelo tša rena, o dumalana le melao ye...
profile.title: Peakanyo ya Phrofaele
profile.total_correct: Palomoka ya Dikarabo tše di Nepagetšego
profile.leave_empty: Tlogela go le feela go boloka sephiri sa bjale
profile.subtitle: Laola tshedimošo ya gago le peakanyo ya polelo

register.title: Hlama akhaonto ya gago
register.password_hint: E swanetše go ba le ditlhaka tše e ka bago tše 8
register.has_account: Na o šetše o na le akhaonto?

best_practice.title: Tsela ye e Botse kudu ya Katlego
best_practice.strategy_desc: Bakeng sa boitemogelo bja go ithuta bja maleba, re go eletša go diriša leano le le bonolo la dikgato tše 3:
best_practice.step1_desc: Oketša mantšu a ka bago a 100 o tsepame go sehlogo se tee (mohlala, Maeto goba Kgwebo) go hlama mooko.
best_practice.step2_desc: E ba setswiri sa mantšu a ka poeletšo ya tšatši le tšatši go fihlela e ba karolo ya tlotlotšhoko ya gago.
best_practice.step3_desc: Fetogela go Tšhidullo ya AI go diriša tlotlotšhoko ya gago ye mpsha mafokong a feletšego le maemong a nnete.

getting_started.title: Go Thoma
getting_started.desc: Synaply ke sedirišwa se matla seo se hlametšwego go go thuša go katološa tlotlotšhoko ya gago le go tokafatša bokgoni bja gago bja polelo o diriša poeletšo e katologantšwego le bohlale bja go itirela.
getting_started.step1_desc: Oketša mantšu ka gago goba o diriše AI go hlama malokelelo go ya ka dihlogo le maemo.
getting_started.step2_title: Kgato ya 2: Tšhidullo ya Tšatši le tšatši
getting_started.step2_desc: Diriša Poeletšo ya Tlotlotšhoko go gopola mantšu o diriša algorithm ya FSRS.

manual.title: Go tsenya ka Gago
manual.desc: Tsenya lentšu ka polelo ye o ithutago yona le phetolelo ya lona. O ka oketša tlhalošo goba mooko bakeng sa go gopola gabotse.

auto_translate.title: Phetolelo ya Itiragalelago
auto_translate.desc: Diriša dintlha tša "Auto-translate" bakeng sa phetolelo ya nako yeo ka tirelo ya DeepL.

ai_list.title: Tlhlamo ya Lelokelelo (AI Word List)
ai_list.desc: Kgetha boemo (A1-C2) le sehlogo, gomme AI (Gemini) e tlo kgobokanya lelokelelo la mantšu a maleba go wena, ao a ka oketšwago go pukuntšu ya gago ka go kgotla gatee.

ai_insights.title: Temogo ya AI
ai_insights.desc: Go lentšu le lengwe le le lengwe, AI e ka fana ka mantšu a amanago, mehlala ya tirišo, le dintlha tša thutapolelo.

spaced_repetition.title: Poeletšo e Katologantšwego
spaced_repetition.desc: Synaply e diriša algorithm ya FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) go balela nako ye e botse ya go boeletša lentšu le lengwe le le lengwe.
spaced_repetition.step1: O bontšhwa lentšu ka polelo ya mathomo.
spaced_repetition.step2: Tsenya phetolelo gomme o kgotle Enter goba Hlahloba Karabo.
spaced_repetition.step3: Ge o sa gopole — kgotla "Ga ke gopole" go bona karabo.
spaced_repetition.step4: Algorithm e tlo balela gape letšatši la poeletšo ye e latelago go ya ka karabo ya gago.

ai_practice.title: Tšhidullo ya AI: Phetolelo ya Mafoko
ai_practice.desc: Seo se thuša go thutapolelo le mooko ka go fetolela mafoko ka moka ao a hlamilwego ke AI go go thuša feela.
ai_practice.how_it_works: Tsela ye e šomago ka yona:
ai_practice.step1: Kgetha sehlogo (mohlala, "Kgwebo", "Maeto") goba o tlogele lefelo le le se nago selo.
ai_practice.step2: AI e tlo hlama mafoko a 5 ka sehlogo seo se kgethilwego.
ai_practice.step3: Romela phetolelo ya gago gomme o amogele dintlha tše di feletšego.
ai_practice.step4: AI e tlo go bontšha diphošo le go šišinya phetolelo ye e botse ka ditlhalošo.

dictionary_management.title: Tsamaiso ya Pukuntšu
dictionary_management.search: Nyaka: Diriša lefelo la go nyaka go hwetša mantšu ka lebelo kgoboketšong ya gago.
dictionary_management.sorting: Go hlaola: Leba lelokelelo la mantšu a gago ka moka ka kgetho ya go a phumola.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Phumola mantšu ka moka: Bokgoni bja go phumola pukuntšu ya gago ka botlalo ka go kgotla gatee.

progress.title: Tšwelopele le Dintlha
progress.desc: Dintlha tša gago (ka godimo ga lenaneo) di bontšha palo ya mantšu ao o a fetoletšego ka nepagalo. Ge dintlha di le godimo, ke mantšu a mantši ao o a feditšego ka katlego!
